# PERF-056 negative: c.JSON called once outside any loop
lang: go
file: PERF-056-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ListUsersSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	users := []string{"alice", "bob", "carol"}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"users": users})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
